recommendations.title: Charm School
recommendations.overview: Defiant 18-year-old Adela León pushes her father and an unbending headmistress to the limit in this delicious comedy.

recommendations.title: The Taste of Things
recommendations.overview: Set in 1889 France, Dodin Bouffant is a chef living with his personal cook and lover Eugénie. They share a long history of gastronomy and love but Eugénie refuses to marry Dodin, so the food lover decides to do something he has never done before: coo

recommendations.title: The Distinguished Citizen
recommendations.overview: After refusing big and prestigious awards all over the world, Mr. Mantovani, Literature Nobel Prize winner, accepts an invitation to visit his hometown in Argentina, which has been the inspiration for all of his books. It turns out that accepting thi

recommendations.title: Soul Kitchen
recommendations.overview: In Hamburg, German-Greek chef Zinos unknowingly disturbs the peace in his locals-only restaurant by hiring a more talented chef.

recommendations.title: Natale da chef
recommendations.overview: A bizarre group consisting of a refined chef with unusual recipes, an assistant cook with taste disturbances and an improvised pastry chef takes part in a competition between chefs to win the contract for the G7.

recommendations.title: Whiplash
recommendations.overview: Under the direction of a ruthless instructor, a talented young drummer begins to pursue perfection at any cost, even his humanity.

recommendations.title: What You Wish For
recommendations.overview: A talented chef with gambling woes flees to a Latin American villa to visit an old friend who appears to be living an extraordinary life as a private chef. Envy soon turns to greed and then to something deeply unsettling for the chef when he assumes

recommendations.title: Today's Special
recommendations.overview: Young Manhattan chef Samir rediscovers his heritage and passion for life through the enchanting art of cooking Indian food.

recommendations.title: Cook Up a Storm
recommendations.overview: An international culinary competition becomes a battleground between rival cooks, one famous for his Cantonese street food and the other a Michelin-starred chef trained in France. But their rivalry takes an unexpected turn when they discover a common

recommendations.title: Dillinger Is Dead
recommendations.overview: A man decides to cook for himself and finds a revolver (which may have belonged to John Dillinger) hidden in his kitchen.
